# Don Moore

## Overview

Consultant and entrepreneur based in New York. Connected with Regis through shared interest in AI-powered business tools for small businesses and startups. Active collaborator since December 2025 — has been exploring how Regis's Dot Connector AI / clarity assessment tool could serve entrepreneurs, PE firms, and nonprofit organizations.

## Key Context

- Previously based in Chicago, now in New York (Hoboken area)
- Connected to **Black Innovation Alliance (BIA)** — a 501(c)(3) supporting entrepreneurs of color, goal of 500K entrepreneurs and 100K jobs in 10 years
- Knows **Michael Adler** — well-connected entrepreneur (Clear Trust Media, cannabis ventures) — offered to introduce Regis
- Has consulting clients including a patient-enabled app and an AI-driven search company
- Offered to serve as lead on partner calls with CRO present to capture partner feedback
- Has been working on a commercial deck (12-13 slides) for BIA sponsor conversations
- Mutual support relationship — both helping each other with networking and business development

## Open Commitments

### From Don
- Forward Regis's deck to Michael Adler and arrange intro meeting
- Send three-slide condensed deck version to Regis
- Share BIA internal materials (presentations, outreach templates, target lists)
- Spend 1-2 weeks learning Dot Connector AI materials; develop instinctive elevator pitch
- Set up Claude project/Spaces with Google Drive, ingest shared materials
- Check with Fred Ehle to confirm no Wisory conflict

### From Regis
- Create customized mockups/sample outputs for partners
- Review Don's consulting materials through the Dot Connector tool
- Run clarity assessment with a real client to generate sample deliverable
- Send project deck, 66-component list, and related files via Google Drive
- Run clarity score/index on HubSpot Small Business Unit as demo

- Strong personal rapport — Don called their meeting "the brightest part of my week"
- Both share concerns about financial stability and business growth
- Regis offered to help Don however he can — genuine mutual support
- Don has international consulting interest (Germany, London, Greece)
- LLC is called "Chuan Group"
- BIA engagement paying ~$20K/month, renewed for 5 more months but Don plans to move on after
- Deep into Claude projects/code — left ChatGPT
